objective: Create a machine readable pull request and continuous integration ledger for nodes twenty eight through forty.
implementation: Added node 7 post-merge lifecycle evidence after PR 310 merge and branch cleanup.
Added a machine-readable PR/CI ledger for hardening nodes 28 through 40 using GitHub PR #291 through #303 metadata.
Added a regression test that verifies each hardening node has a merged PR, merge commit, and nine successful readiness checks.
